title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at 91Springboard

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at 91Springboard
jsonLd.description:
91Springboard, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About 91Springboard:
91Springboard is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 91Springboard!
